review_questions: Does the implementation stay inside P4-IMPL-05 and the P4-SPEC-03 readiness/dirty-state/release-lock-input intent?
Does release readiness packet validation reject missing gates, stale hashes, preview hash-cycle fields, dirty release inputs, and semantic payloads?
Does release lock input bundle validation require P4-SPEC-01/02/03 decisions, build evidence, suite/package/example/migration/readiness hashes, source commit, and human authorization?
Does release lock input construction avoid DRD_HARNESS_RELEASE_LOCK creation, package publishing, readiness packet embedding, and real lock output path declarations?
Do targeted tests, P4 tests, full regression, runtime-boundary-check, py_compile, and git diff check pass?
